name: Cascade Village
description: Cascade Village is a place to play pickleball in Durango, CO. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: Dalton Ranch Golf Club
description: Come play pickleball at Dalton Ranch Golf Club in Durango, CO! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Durango Community Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Durango Community Recreation Center in Durango, CO! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like locker rooms, restrooms, and water. A one-time fee is required to play. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: Glacier Club
description: Glacier Club is a place to play pickleball in Durango, CO. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play.

name: Santa Rita Park
description: Come play pickleball at Santa Rita Park in Durango, CO! There is 1 indoor hard court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The court is free.

name: Schneider Park
description: Durango’s brand new pickleball courts along the Animas river.
open_play_schedule:
The courts will operate under a drop-in system from 7:30 a.m. - 1 p.m. 

From 1 p.m. until sunset: Courts will be available under open-court rules where play takes place under a first-come, first-served basis unless a reservation is made. 

To make a reservation, go to the city's Parks and Recreation website and scroll to "Tennis/Pickleball Court Reservations." Reservations for the Schneider Park pickleball courts cannot be made until Tuesday morning, but normally reservations can be made up to 10 days in advance. Cost is $2 per court per hour. 

The courts will close at sunset.
fees: Fee required — Free for drop-in. Court reservations are $2 per court per hour.
